description: Path criticality SSOT for harness mode tiering (rules/80 §F). Used by detect-task-mode.py to classify scope_paths into critical/medium/low and determine mode (quick-fix/standard/heavy).

comments.default: Anything outside the two lists = medium (default).
comments.matching: glob fnmatch matching. If a path matches both critical and low, critical wins (regression risk first).
comments.extension_policy: Adding a new path pattern is per-PR — changing this SSOT is equivalent in weight to a rules/80 §F intent change.
